title: 有馬記念の後に・道はまだ遠く……

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Phew... Hmm, I've still got a ways to go.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It'll take a lot to win against Tamtam and Oguri.
They're still miles ahead of me in terms of skill.
choice_data_list: Don't rush yourself. Just keep at it.
Don't rush yourself. Just keep at it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
After all, we've taken everything one step at a
time up until now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
They may seem out of reach today, but I'm sure
I'll catch up to them eventually. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So... What should our first goal for next year be?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If possible, I'd like to go somewhere new
together.
choice_data_list: Then how about the Osaka Hai?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai! At the Hanshin racecourse, right?
That sounds so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
This year was a tough one, but I hope next year
starts on a positive note! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: S'up, Oguri? Is Creek really buggin' ya that much?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm not worried yet. But if she keeps improving
like that, then she'll be more fearsome than
anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
She approaches every race calmly, resolutely, and
without ever folding. That's the kind of
Umamusume she is.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The heck? You suddenly got all serious on me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we have to stay sharp and train hard.
Also...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna eat till I drop in Osaka.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I should've known you'd be thinkin' about
somethin' like that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As things heat up, Super Creek realizes that she
still has a long road ahead of her.
